title: あなたの背中を“推し”たくて……

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Agnes Digital and I are at a ramen
restaurant, when...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I-I finally got the chance to come here!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hyah! R-R-Rob Roy! At a ramen restaurant! What
a rare sighting!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Let's see... page 257, shoyu... ramen... here it is.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: E-excuse me... Ummm... Excuse me!

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text: I've got two orders of shio ramen!
choice_data_list: It looks like they didn't hear her.
It looks like they didn't hear her.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hmmm?! It seems Rob Roy is in a pickle!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! Could you get her order over there,
please?! I swear I'll never ask you for anything
else ever again!

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whoa, that's quite a promise! I'll get on it
right away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Agnes Digital's help, Zenno Rob Roy
manages to place her order. However, not long
after...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Let's see, it looks like it's best with tons of
pepper... Oh? There's none on the table...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Special delivery coming through!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Whooosh!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Wh-what was that just—oh! There's pepper now!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Mission accomplished! Please, take your time and
savor the ramen...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Stumbling upon Rob Roy enjoying ramen... this is the result of building good karma.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Um... Digital?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Whaaa?! Rob Roy! Um, I... uh!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Thank you... for helping me out earlier.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ah, um uh, I-I-I-I'm so sorry! Really, I shouldn't
have stuck my nose in!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Not at all! It's thanks to you that I was able to eat
the ramen I'd been looking forward to.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
This book I'm reading has a scene where the main
character eats ramen the night before a race...
The restaurant in the book is modeled after the
one we just visited.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I thought that if I could eat the same thing as the
main character, maybe I could run like her too...
Although it's probably just wishful thinking.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: ...Rob Roy.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Y-yes?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: There's something I must tell you...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You work hard day in and day out, all in an
innocent chase for victory, as if appealing to
some higher power.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
In my heart, you are already the main character!
There's nothing more I could ask for than to be of
help to you!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Th-th-that makes me so happy! Just... so very
happy...
choice_data_list: You're a main character too, Digital.
You're a main character too, Digital.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Th-th-that makes me so happy! Just... so very
happy...
choice_data_list: You're a main character too, Digital.
You're a main character too, Digital.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I only spoke what was honestly on my mind.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I see. Anyway, I have to go, but let's eat
ramen together sometime.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Let's... do that?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hwaaah! No way! Did one of my oshis just invite
me to ramen?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The image of her glasses fogging up as she blew
on her ramen is still fresh in my head!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: And to think I've been offered the chance to behold her person again enjoying another steamy bowl! My mouth is watering already... Drool!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Love for Umamusume bursts from within Agnes
Digital, just like always!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whargh?! Wh-what are you saying? I'm nothing
more than a supporter, a mere pleb!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
But I... I don't really stand out either. Hehe... We
may be birds of a feather.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wha?! Us? B-birds of a feather?! Th-th-th-that's
far too immodest a thought!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm so sorry! You must not like being
compared to someone like me...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
No! I'm overjoyed that I can... sh-share the same
feelings as.... y-y-y-y-y-y...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Overwhelmed by conflicting emotions, Agnes
Digital completely loses her grip!
